parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-4 setWeightFineTuneEngine parity — declining e1RM trend hitting the LOWER projection clamp. Five in-window push-a/bench-press sessions with falling load (65→50kg x 6 reps) give a negative weekly slope steep enough that projected e1RM < currentE1rm*0.95, so clamp pins it to the 0.95 floor — yet |slope| stays under currentE1rm*0.1 so fallbackReason is undefined. Pins the lower-clamp arm + negative-slope basis. A windowWeeks=4 probe pins the window override. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Falling load => negative slope; projected < 0.95c => lower clamp; |slope| < 0.1c => not noisy.
